title: Assertion fault doing a REPLACE with index on an expression.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x Float64, y String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
CREATE INDEX t2xy ON t2(x + 1) TYPE minmax;
INSERT INTO t2(x, y) VALUES(3.14, 'three point one four') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE y = 'three point one four';
INSERT INTO t2(x, y) VALUES(NULL, 'null value');
key_bug_features: REPLACE statement with index on an expression
